name: TitleMax Title Pawns
description_short: Stone Mountain, GA – TitleMax Title Pawns at 1109 Goldsmith Rd offers title loans and pawn services to local residents.
description_long:
Located at 1109 Goldsmith Rd Suite C in Stone Mountain, GA, TitleMax Title Pawns is a standalone pawn and title loan shop serving the local community. The Stone Mountain branch is open Monday–Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM, Saturday 10 AM to 4 PM, and closed on Sundays. This accessible Stone Mountain location makes it convenient for residents to access fast financial solutions when they need them.

This Stone Mountain location specializes in title loans (secured by your vehicle's title) and pawn loans on eligible items. To discuss your options or learn about current terms, call +1 770-498-1407 during business hours. The staff can explain what collateral types they accept and help you complete the application quickly.

When you need fast cash in Stone Mountain, GA, bring your vehicle title (if applying for a title loan), government-issued photo ID, and proof of income. Title loans are designed for borrowers who own their vehicle outright and need quick access to funds without a credit check.
address: 1109 Goldsmith Rd Ste C, Stone Mountain, GA 30083

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee offered. TitleMax is a lending product; loan terms and fees are governed by state-specific contracts confirmed at signing.

pros: Cash disbursed in as little as 30 minutes — among the fastest title loan funding available
No credit check required; vehicle equity is the sole qualification criteria
Borrower keeps and drives their vehicle throughout the entire loan term
900+ store locations across 14 states for broad in-person access
Loan amounts up to $25,000 based on vehicle value — higher ceiling than most emergency-cash products
No prepayment penalty — borrowers can pay off the balance early at no extra cost
24/7 online account management and mobile app for payments and balance checks
cons: APRs typically range from 119% to 179% and may exceed 300% — among the most expensive credit products available to consumers
CFPB enforcement action taken against TMX Finance LLC in 2023 for consumer protection violations
Vehicle title — and ultimately the vehicle itself — is at risk if the borrower defaults
Fee schedules are state-specific and not prominently disclosed on the main website; exact costs require an in-store visit to confirm
Available only in 14 states, limiting accessibility for most U.S. borrowers
best_for: Vehicle owners with equity in their car or motorcycle facing a genuine financial emergency
Borrowers with poor or no credit history who cannot qualify for traditional bank or credit union loans
Individuals who need same-day cash and can repay quickly to limit high-interest accrual
Customers in one of the 14 states where TitleMax operates who need a physical in-person lender
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for credit-constrained borrowers who own a vehicle and need fast cash with no credit check — particularly those who have already exhausted lower-cost options. The primary caveat is serious: APRs between 119% and 300%+ make this one of the costliest credit products available, and a 2023 CFPB enforcement action against parent company TMX Finance raises additional consumer protection concerns that borrowers should weigh carefully before signing.
services: Car title loans (short-term loans secured by auto title)
Car title pawns (Georgia and select states — pawn structure secured by auto title)
Personal installment loans (available in AZ, DE, KS, MS, MO, NV, SC, TN, TX, UT, WI)
Mobile app for Android and iOS (balance checks, payment due dates, payments)
Early payoff with no prepayment penalty
In-store vehicle value assessment for loan qualification
meta_description: TitleMax Title Pawns at 1109 Goldsmith Rd, Stone Mountain, GA. Fast title loans, no credit check.
